allowed_surfaces: Dynasty Asset Value; Roster Decision Value; Draft Value
confidence_effect: Can raise confidence when identity, season, and stat type are validated.
receipt_requirement: Show raw stat, season, source file/hash, normalized value, and contribution.
leakage_rule: Historical sourced stats may drive private football value.
missing_data_rule: Missing data must remain missing/unavailable/review; it cannot become zero, average, or positive evidence.
notes: Passing evidence must be position-aware; raw QB points still pass through 1QB VORP.

allowed_surfaces: Dynasty Asset Value; Roster Decision Value; Draft Value
confidence_effect: Can raise confidence when imported as real player rushing evidence.
receipt_requirement: Show raw stat, season, source file/hash, normalized value, and contribution.
leakage_rule: Historical sourced rushing stats may drive private football value.
missing_data_rule: Missing data must remain missing/unavailable/review; it cannot become zero, average, or positive evidence.
notes: Efficiency and explosive fields must be shrunk and cannot dominate volume.

allowed_surfaces: Dynasty Asset Value; Roster Decision Value; Draft Value
confidence_effect: Can raise confidence when imported as real receiving evidence.
receipt_requirement: Show raw stat, season, source file/hash, normalized value, and contribution.
leakage_rule: Historical sourced receiving stats may drive private football value.
missing_data_rule: Missing data must remain missing/unavailable/review; it cannot become zero, average, or positive evidence.
notes: Non-PPR model should favor yards, targets, and first downs over receptions.

allowed_surfaces: Dynasty Asset Value; Roster Decision Value; Draft Value
confidence_effect: Can support talent/efficiency with confidence penalty and sample-size warning.
receipt_requirement: Show raw advanced field, source file/hash, sample, normalized value, warning.
leakage_rule: Advanced stats may support private value only as sourced evidence.
missing_data_rule: Missing data must remain missing/unavailable/review; it cannot become zero, average, or positive evidence.
notes: Duplicate/context-sensitive fields must stay disambiguated before scoring.

allowed_surfaces: Dynasty Asset Value; Roster Decision Value; Draft Value
confidence_effect: Can support historical evidence after canonical file index and identity checks.
receipt_requirement: Show canonical source file/hash, raw field, normalized value, and warning.
leakage_rule: Historical sourced exports may support private value after validation.
missing_data_rule: Missing data must remain missing/unavailable/review; it cannot become zero, average, or positive evidence.
notes: FantasyPros advanced stats are historical evidence, not projections.

allowed_surfaces: Dynasty Asset Value; Roster Decision Value; Draft Value
confidence_effect: Can raise confidence after duplicate/header cleanup and identity match.
receipt_requirement: Show raw first downs, cleanup warnings, source hash, scoring constant, contribution.
leakage_rule: Validated rushing/receiving first downs may drive private value.
missing_data_rule: Missing data must remain missing/unavailable/review; it cannot become zero, average, or positive evidence.
notes: Only actual sourced first-down fields count as direct first-down evidence.

allowed_surfaces: Dynasty Asset Value; Roster Decision Value; Draft Value
confidence_effect: Can support only small direct scoring evidence.
receipt_requirement: Show return yards, return TDs, scoring constants, source hash, contribution.
leakage_rule: Return stats may score only through official return scoring constants.
missing_data_rule: Missing data must remain missing/unavailable/review; it cannot become zero, average, or positive evidence.
notes: Return production is not a major talent signal.

allowed_surfaces: Dynasty Asset Value; Roster Decision Value; Draft Value
confidence_effect: Can raise role confidence as snap evidence, with proxy warning.
receipt_requirement: Show offensive snaps, snap share, games, source hash, and proxy warning.
leakage_rule: Snap share cannot be treated as route participation.
missing_data_rule: Missing data must remain missing/unavailable/review; it cannot become zero, average, or positive evidence.
notes: QB snap count is generally context only because starters play full snaps.

allowed_surfaces: Dynasty Asset Value; Roster Decision Value; Draft Value
confidence_effect: Can support role shape and route/slot context with confidence penalty.
receipt_requirement: Show raw alignment counts, source file/hash, and role warning.
leakage_rule: Alignment can inform role but cannot fabricate routes run or TPRR.
missing_data_rule: Missing data must remain missing/unavailable/review; it cannot become zero, average, or positive evidence.
notes: Alignment is not a substitute for full route participation unless denominators exist.

allowed_surfaces: Dynasty Asset Value; Roster Decision Value; Draft Value
confidence_effect: Can raise TE role confidence when direct route fields are present.
receipt_requirement: Show route field, denominator, source file/hash, sample, and contribution.
leakage_rule: Direct licensed route metrics may drive private value with route receipts.
missing_data_rule: Missing data must remain missing/unavailable/review; it cannot become zero, average, or positive evidence.
notes: Do not generalize TE route fields to WR/RB route data unless sourced.

field_pattern: weekly targets|team target pct|yards per target
allowed_surfaces: Dynasty Asset Value; Roster Decision Value; Draft Value
confidence_effect: Can support usage and target-earning confidence.
receipt_requirement: Show weekly target rows, team denominator if used, source hash, contribution.
leakage_rule: Targets may drive private value; yards per target must be shrunk.
missing_data_rule: Missing data must remain missing/unavailable/review; it cannot become zero, average, or positive evidence.
notes: Weekly target exports are usage evidence, not projection evidence.

allowed_surfaces: Context Panels; Confidence Warnings; Receipts
confidence_effect: Can explain role risk and confidence but cannot directly add value.
receipt_requirement: Show depth slot, status suffix, source file/hash, and date.
leakage_rule: Depth charts cannot directly drive private football value.
missing_data_rule: Missing data must remain missing/unavailable/review; it cannot become zero, average, or positive evidence.
notes: Landing spot can be visible context until a formula lane explicitly accepts it.

allowed_surfaces: Context Panels; Confidence Warnings; Receipts
confidence_effect: Can lower confidence or add risk language; absence is not healthy evidence.
receipt_requirement: Show injury status, return text, source file/hash, and timestamp.
leakage_rule: Injury context cannot directly boost private football value.
missing_data_rule: Missing data must remain missing/unavailable/review; it cannot become zero, average, or positive evidence.
notes: Healthy-by-absence is rejected.

allowed_surfaces: Context Panels; Confidence Warnings; Receipts

missing_data_rule: Missing data must remain missing/unavailable/review; it cannot become zero, average, or positive evidence.
notes: Team context can be used for audit/sanity before explicit formula acceptance.

allowed_surfaces: Model Lab; Receipts; Audit Reports

missing_data_rule: Missing data must remain missing/unavailable/review; it cannot become zero, average, or positive evidence.
notes: Local model-owned expected value should replace imported projections.

allowed_surfaces: Model Lab; Receipts; Audit Reports
confidence_effect: No confidence benefit.

missing_data_rule: Missing data must remain missing/unavailable/review; it cannot become zero, average, or positive evidence.
notes: Reject supplied fantasy-point totals unless recomputed locally from raw stats.

missing_data_rule: Missing data must remain missing/unavailable/review; it cannot become zero, average, or positive evidence.

allowed_surfaces: Trade Context; Market Comparison; Sanity Review

missing_data_rule: Missing data must remain missing/unavailable/review; it cannot become zero, average, or positive evidence.

allowed_surfaces: Draft Value; Rookie Analyzer; Young Bridge Review; Receipts

missing_data_rule: Missing data must remain missing/unavailable/review; it cannot become zero, average, or positive evidence.
notes: Draft capital must decay once NFL evidence exists.

allowed_surfaces: Draft Value; Rookie Analyzer; Young Bridge Review; Receipts

allowed_surfaces: Draft Value; Rookie Analyzer; Young Bridge Review; Receipts

missing_data_rule: Missing data must remain missing/unavailable/review; it cannot become zero, average, or positive evidence.
notes: Market share is prospect evidence, not NFL production evidence.
